Notice And Motion By Paul Thibeault For Ex Parte Application To Advance Or Specially Set Hearing Date For Petition For Order Appointing Trustee And Petition To Void Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Appointing Trustee To Fill Vacancy In The Office Of Trustee, And To Waive Bond
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Joint Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And For Approval Of Settlement On Behalf Of A Minor Beneficiary
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Mary Connolly and Patricia Dark.
Edward Koplowitz for Scott Hildula (Guardian Ad Litem for Minor Morgan Hildula) and for Jospeh Hildula.
David Baer for and with Paul Thibeault (Co-Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not the Court should approve the settlement agreement, whether Ms. Connolly has standing to object the petition, the amount of Paul's liability, whether or not Wells Fargo Bank records where improperly obtained, the issue of mortgage fraud, a property being listed twice, the issue of sale of the property not being in Morgan and Joseph's best interest, whether or not the deeds where transferred on a conditional basis, whether transfer in the refinance where disguise transfers or real transfers, enforceability of the settlement agreement, conflict of interest between Mary and Joseph and Morgan, the formula used to allocate the mortgage, calculation of the Paul Thibeault's debts/accuracy of the figures, the issue of no protection for the Children if the mortgage company decides to foreclose, exclusive rights to occupancy of the property, loss of the Children's right to secure their 25% interest in the property if the settlement is approved, the issue of money going into a blocked account, the form of the order, etc. The Court noted that if the settlement is approved, the other petitions will become moot. The Petition for Approval of Settlement of Agreement, etc., Petition for Order Appointing Trustee to Fill Vacancy in the Office of Trustee, etc. and Petition to Recover Real Property Interest Transferred from Trust, etc. are taken under submission. Status on mediation is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order Appointing Trustee To Fill Vacancy In The Office Of Trustee, And To Waive Bond
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Scott Hildula (Guardian Ad Litem) and Joseph Hildula.
David Baer for Paul Thibeault (Respondent).
Emilie Calhoun for Mary Connolly (Petitioner).

The parties reported that they had one session of mediation, but nothing was resolved and that their positions have not changed. Ms. Calhoun stated that she is still waiting for a hearing date on her Amended 850 Petition. The Petition for Order Appointing Trustee, etc., Petition to Recover Real Property, etc. and status on mediation are continued to April 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Trustee To Fill Vacancy In The Office Of Trustee, And To Waive Bond
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Continued To Feb-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for and with Mary Connolly.
Edward Koplowitz for and with Scott Hildula (Guardian Ad Litem for his Daughter) and for Joseph Hildula.
David Baer for Paul Thibeault (Respondent/Objector).

Ms. Calhoun stated that she filed an Amended 850 Petition and that she is waiting for a hearing date. Mr. Koplowitz requested a continuance based on his proposed resolution stating that his Clients are agreeable to a sale, that Ms. Calhoun's Client's desire to do partition in kind is not available, that Paul agreed to deed to his Clients the 25% they are entitled to, that they will withdraw their nomination and that this will moot the 850 Petition. Mr. Baer stated that his Client's perspective is that litigation is way out of proportion, that they have a settlement in principle that Mr. Thibeault sent to the Parties yesterday and that Mr. Koplowitz's Clients' position is that litigation does not need to continue. Ms. Calhoun spoke of the terms of the settlement, explained why a Trustee is needed and stated that her Clients are willing to go forward with mediation provided Mr. Thibeault provides loan documents. The Petition for Order Appointing Trustee, etc., Petition to Recover Real Property, etc. and status on mediation are continued to February 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
